summary: Verified the new 'Eligibility' step in CreateEstatePage wizard. All 6 eligibility options display correctly (Active Duty Military, Federal/State Operator, First Responder, Veteran, Hospice Patient, Employer/B2B). Backend POST /api/accounts/create-estate correctly accepts and saves special_status and b2b_code. Subscription status endpoint returns eligible_tiers and special_status from user profile.
critical_code_review_comments: CreateEstatePage.js: Eligibility step correctly added as LAST step in computeSteps() for benefactors (Line 168) - VERIFIED
CreateEstatePage.js: All 6 special status options present in eligibility step UI (Lines 683-720) - VERIFIED
CreateEstatePage.js: B2B code input shows conditionally when 'enterprise' selected (Lines 723-734) - VERIFIED
CreateEstatePage.js: canAdvance() correctly requires b2b_code when enterprise selected (Lines 207-209) - VERIFIED
estates.py: CreateEstateRequest model accepts special_status (list) and b2b_code (str) fields (Lines 261-262) - VERIFIED
estates.py: create_estate_for_existing_user computes eligible_tier from special_status and saves to user doc (Lines 339-368) - VERIFIED
checkout.py: Status endpoint returns eligible_tiers and special_status from user profile (Lines 94-98) - VERIFIED
SubscriptionManagement.js: autoTier logic correctly uses eligible_tiers and special_status to auto-select plans (Lines 178-184) - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Eligibility step UI verified with all 6 options and B2B code input

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing (test_eligibility_*, test_enterprise_*, test_final_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The CreateEstatePage now includes an Eligibility step as the LAST step for benefactors. This step allows users to select special eligibility (military, veteran, hospice, enterprise, etc.) for discounted pricing. The backend saves these selections to the user profile (special_status, eligible_tier), and the subscription status endpoint returns them for the frontend to auto-select appropriate plans.

verified_features.eligibility_step_is_last: PASS - Step order: Confirm -> Role -> Family -> [Beneficiaries] -> Eligibility
verified_features.all_6_options_visible: PASS - Active Duty Military, Federal/State Operator, First Responder, Veteran, Hospice Patient, Employer/B2B
verified_features.b2b_code_input_on_enterprise: PASS - Partner Access Code input appears when Employer/B2B selected
verified_features.step_is_skippable: PASS - User can proceed without selecting any option (Skip if none apply)
verified_features.backend_saves_eligible_tier: PASS - Computes and saves eligible_tier from special_status (military/veteran/hospice/enterprise)
verified_features.subscription_status_returns_fields: PASS - Returns eligible_tiers and special_status arrays
verified_features.subscription_auto_select_tier: PASS - SubscriptionManagement uses autoTier logic from eligible_tiers/special_status

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS OTP: MOCKED - OTP globally disabled via platform_settings.otp_disabled=true
